summary: Iteration 153 - Pillar Resolver API Testing. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). The new /api/pillar-resolver/ endpoints are working correctly. Services have base_tags, products are filtered by pillar rules, and travel pillar correctly excludes cakes/food/frozen items.
critical_code_review_comments: Pillar resolver API correctly implements rule-based filtering from pillar_rules_v1.yaml
All 14 pillars are valid and accessible via /api/pillar-resolver/list
Travel pillar correctly excludes cakes, food, and frozen items - VERIFIED
Services have base_tags with proper structure (service_type, delivery_mode, session_type, duration)
17 care services found with base_tags (100% tagged)
Unknown pillar handling works correctly with fallback to legacy query
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pillar resolver API fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/pillar-resolver/products/{pillar}, /api/pillar-resolver/services/{pillar}, /api/pillar-resolver/all/{pillar}, /api/pillar-resolver/rules/{pillar}, /api/pillar-resolver/list. All 14 pillars supported. Services have base_tags with fields: service_type, delivery_mode, session_type, duration, provider_type, life_stage, breed_size, temperament, benefits, price_tier, booking_type.

test_results.all_endpoint: PASS - returns both products and services
